etymology.description: Semantic еЅі(еЅі) (chГ¬, "step") + Phonetic жѓЄ(жѓЄ) (dГ©, "virtue") -> рў›і(рў›і) corrupted to create гҐЃ -> Variant of еѕ·(еѕ·) (dГ©, "virtue")
etymology.interpretation: The character гҐЃ is a variant form of еѕ·(еѕ·) (dГ©, "virtue"), using the road/step component еЅі(еЅі) (chГ¬) alongside a corrupted phonetic representation of жѓЄ(жѓЄ). The variant form was affected by historical character reforms and variants.
